import org.slf4j.Logger;

// A report-then-rethrow pair inside a lambda must not affect JV006 for this
// catch: the lambda is its own frame, invisible to the outer scan. The outer
// `throw e` alone is a bare rethrow, not a double capture.
class LambdaBoundaryDoubleCapture {
    private final Logger log;

    LambdaBoundaryDoubleCapture(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
    }

    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Runnable r = () -> {
                log.error("failed", e);
                throw new RuntimeException(e);
            };
            throw e;
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
